steps.title: Center Thornton's unique status
steps.content: The text opens by saying Thornton alone held Buck and that the rest of mankind was as nothing. The later details show Buck tolerating others only because they are connected to Thornton.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported generalizations
steps.content: Choice A claims a change since living with Thornton, Choice B says Buck mistrusts all humans, and Choice C claims Thornton's friends liked Buck. The main idea is that Buck values Thornton above everyone else. The answer is D.
